subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Aforetime thou hast attained unto the traces of the Most Exalted Pen. The glances of loving-kindness from the precincts of the Prison are directed toward that quarter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی از قبل باثار قلم اعلی فائز شدی لحاظ عنایت از شطر سجن بان شطر توجه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
